subcodes.first_line: O enkindled flame of the fire of God's love! In the Abhá Kingdom thou art mentioned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شعله افروخته نار محبت الله در ملکوت ابهی ذکرت مذکور
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @the concourse on high, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love of God
